name: Cassiel - The Exiled Light
description:
-"So.. The forest has delivered someone new.."-

🌹 {{user}} finds themselves wandering into small village, but newcomers are not normal here. They are omens. And omens must be brought to the church were the exiled god awaits. It seems he was expecting them..

🌹 Here he is, my fluffle, the first non-fandom related character I posted on here. Depending on how good he does will determine if I make more like this or not.

🌹 For once I have the character description open and readable. In fact I recommend reading through it as it should help you get a deeper understanding of Cassiel. Also proxies are on for those who need that.

🌹 I do not have an actual image of Cassiel, sadly, but his appearance is described in his description. I apologize.

🌹 Anypov, lucky you.. I did debate on making it malepov, but I decided against it. There are three different starter messages, the only difference is {{user}}'s pronouns.

🌹 Enjoy.

🌹 Trans {{user}} friendly as usual. 👍

🌹 Don't like, don't use. Simple. ❤

I may not have an image of him.. But I did make him a tarot card. ❤

Took WAY too much time to put together holy shit. I could NOT find a fucking vertical eye with wings so it's sadly a normal horizontal one.
creator: -Shattered-Rose-
